title: Oryza plena
taxonomy: Oryza plena is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. It is a type of wild rice native to Asia. Oryza plena is classified within the genus Oryza, which includes other species of wild rice, including Oryza sativa. The genus Oryza is further classified in the subfamily Oryzoideae and the family Poaceae. Oryza plena is closely related to other species of wild rice, such as Oryza longistaminata and Oryza rufipogon.
